reason: The protocol was frozen but never run. Before execution, the review gate required explicit stratification by top root, first-eligible-orbit rank, prefix-plus-triple stabilizer tier, and deficit branch-count quantile. The replacement discriminator-v2 preserves the 48-child, fixed-5-second, first-versus-last design while adding those declared strata.
claim_limit: No solver result or mathematical claim is attached to this superseded protocol.
